summary: First-finish smoke test of The Wed Cinema landing + FastAPI backend. All 8 backend endpoints behave per spec (200/409/422 as expected). Frontend landing renders cinematic hero, dual CTAs, live spot counter wired to /api/founders/stats, 4 pricing tiers, and full apply→success flow works end-to-end. Counter decremented live (98→97) after Playwright signup, confirming integration.
passed: POST /api/founders/apply valid payload → 200, returns full record with id+created_at; remaining decremented
POST /api/founders/apply duplicate email → 409 'An application with this email already exists.'
POST /api/founders/apply invalid email format → 422 with EmailStr validation error
GET /api/founders/applications → 200, sorted newest-first (verified Kavya 07:31 before Aanya)
GET /api/episodes/demo → 200, wedding metadata + 4 episodes (Haldi, Mehndi, Sangeet, Ceremony) with thumb URLs
Frontend loads at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — hero 'Deliver weddings like Netflix.' visually rendered (split spans), dual CTAs (Book Live Demo / Watch Demo Wedding) visible
founders-counter shows live '97 of 100 spots remaining' from /api/founders/stats
Apply form submission with valid data shows apply-success: "You're on the list."
Counter decremented live from 98→97 after Playwright submission (integration confirmed)
No console errors during landing render
observations: Playwright text="Deliver weddings like Netflix" returned not-visible because hero is split across nested <span> elements (separate 'Deliver weddings' and 'like Netflix.' spans). Visually correct — screenshot confirms. Not a bug.

After success screen, modal remains open and Escape key did not dismiss it. Acceptable UX (user clicks close X), but the test could not re-open modal to test inline duplicate-email error in UI. Duplicate-email path verified at API layer (HTTP 409). LOW priority — consider verifying inline error UX in full testing pass.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth required for this app
